input.command: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/36/reviews --jq '.[].body' 2>&1 && echo "---" && gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/36/comments --jq '.[].body' 2>&1
input.description: Get all review and issue comments

content.content:
## Code Review

This pull request expands the Overseerr integration by adding tools for retrieving request details, deleting requests, and retrying failed requests. The implementation includes updates to the agent's tool dispatching logic, new input schemas, and extensions to the Overseerr client and its associated data types. I have no feedback to provide.
---

I have no feedback to provide.","submittedAt":"2026-04-03T22:11:48Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"reactionGroups":[],"state":"COMMENTED","commit":{"oid":"8c07348b795fb32992724ee0d89399bc2bdfd164"}}]}
===
## Summary
- Add `GetRequest`, `DeleteRequest`, and `RetryRequest` to the Overseerr client with a new `delete()` HTTP helper
- Wire up three new agent tools: `get_request_detail`, `delete_request` (destructive), `retry_request` (destructive)
- Enrich the `Request` type with `UpdatedAt`, `Seasons`, and additional `MediaInfo` fields for the detail view
- Add httptest-based tests for all three new client methods

## Test plan
- [x] `go build ./...` passes
- [x] `go test ./...` passes (including new tests for GetRequest, DeleteRequest, RetryRequest)
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean

Run: 20260403-1806-d904
